Welcome to Hipster Soda!

Here at Hipster Soda, we believe that everyone deserves a refreshing drink that's both delicious and unique. Our team of passionate mixologists creates innovative flavors that are sure to delight your taste buds.

whether you're looking for a classic flavor or something new and exciting, we have the perfect soda for you.

we have many exciting flavors to choose from! below are all of the flavors that are currently available:

Lime and Lemon

our lime and lemon flavor is a refreshing blend of citrus notes that will invigorate your senses. the ingredients include: fresh lime juice, natural lemon extract, mint, and artificial preservatives.

Raspberry and Strawberry

our raspberry and strawberry flavor is a sweet and fruity blend that will satisfy your taste buds. the ingredients include: natural raspberry extract, natural strawberry extract, and artificial flavors.

Apple and Honey

our apple and honey flavor is a classic combination that brings together the crispness of apple with the sweetness of honey. the ingredients include: fresh apple juice, natural honey, and artificial preservatives.
